sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ سَلْمَى تَجْلِسُ بِجَانِبِ صَدِيقَتِهَا فِي الفَصْلِ.
sentences.translation: Selma je sjedila pored svoje prijateljice u razredu.
sentences.translationEn: Salma used to sit next to her friend in class.

sentences.arabic: إِذَا لَمْ تَفْهَمْ سَلْمَى سَاعَدَتْهَا صَدِيقَتُهَا.
sentences.translation: Ako Selma nije razumjela, prijateljica bi joj pomogla.
sentences.translationEn: If Salma did not understand, her friend helped her.

sentences.translation: Nastavnik je bio sretan što surađuju.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher was happy because they cooperated.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: التَّعَاوُنُ يُسَاعِدُ الجَمِيعَ عَلَى التَّعَلُّمِ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je: Suradnja pomaže svima da uče.
sentences.translationEn: He said: Cooperation helps everyone to learn.
